screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: This is the landing page of a team workspace web app, designed to introduce the product and drive user sign-ups or early access requests.

screens.name: Store
screens.purpose: This is the store page of a web application, designed for users to browse and purchase subscription plans and add-ons.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: This is the workspace dashboard screen, which provides a high-level overview of team project metrics and recent activity.

screens.name: Tasks
screens.purpose: This is the Tasks screen of a web application, which is used for creating, tracking, and managing a to-do list.

screens.name: Contact
screens.purpose: This is a Contact Us page, designed for users to get in touch with the company's team by filling out a form, sending an email, or starting a live chat.
